message:
style(fsfs): apply rustfmt to main.rs and runtime.rs

Reformats two files to satisfy rustfmt conventions:

- main.rs: Collapses multi-line let binding for run_with_shutdown into
  a single logical expression aligned with standard Rust formatting.

- runtime.rs: Normalizes ~15 formatting patterns across the vector
  index subsystem (append_batch, compact, daemon mode):
  - Collapses single-variant struct literals (IndexNotFound) to one line
  - Reformats multi-line .map_err closures to standard chain style
  - Flattens unnecessary nesting in match arms (Ok(mut index) => match
    becomes Ok(mut index) => match with direct arm notation)
  - Collapses short metadata().map().unwrap_or() chains to single lines
  - Reformats println! macro calls with long format strings
  - Normalizes indentation in daemon compaction result handling

No behavioral changes; all modifications are whitespace/formatting only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
